Description: MAG: Flavobacteriales bacterium isolate 8533b3cd-f90e-4a47-8fbb-482e72fcba36 genome assembly, chromosome: 1
Assembly: The metagenome-assembled genome assembly xcSepLess1.Flavobacteriales_1.1 is based on 30x PacBio data and Arima Hi-C data generated by the Aquatic Symbiosis Genomics Project (https://www.aquaticsymbiosisgenomics.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm and coverage-, graph-, and HiC-based contig binning.

Taxonomy_x: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Nematoda; Chromadorea; Rhabditida; Rhabditina; Rhabditomorpha; Rhabditoidea; Rhabditidae; Peloderinae; Caenorhabditis
Description: Caenorhabditis astrocarya genome assembly, chromosome: IV
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Nematoda; Chromadorea; Rhabditida; Rhabditina; Rhabditomorpha; Rhabditoidea; Rhabditidae; Peloderinae; Caenorhabditis
Assembly: The assembly nxCaeAstr2.1 is based on 433x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Wellcome Sanger Institute Tree of Life Programme (https://www.sanger.ac.uk/programme/tree-of-life/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds are named by synteny based on Caenorhabditis elegans () GCA_000002985.3. The chromosomes (including X) were named based on BUSCO painting to C.elegans N2. No sex was assigned to the sample, as it was a from a pool of different sex. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome II (8.9Mbp - end) are unknown.

Taxonomy_x: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Lepidoptera; Glossata; Ditrysia; Noctuoidea; Erebidae; Arctiinae; Hypercompe
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Lepidoptera; Glossata; Ditrysia; Noctuoidea; Erebidae; Arctiinae; Hypercompe
Assembly: The assembly ilHypScri1.1 is based on 39x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using rapid curation. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size.
